name: visual-debunk-pipeline-v1
description: Full visual evidence pipeline: image/video forensics via VLM → caption cross-check → inquisitor integration → consensus vote. Handles deepfakes, out-of-context imagery, and misleading captions.

steps.name: asset-retrieve
steps.prompt_template: Retrieve and archive the media asset at URL: {{input.asset_url}}. Compute SHA256 hash. If video: extract {{config.video_keyframe_sample_rate}} keyframes per 30-second segment. Archive original URL to Wayback Machine. Return: asset_hash, archived_url, keyframe_paths (if video), extracted_audio_transcript (if video, use openai-whisper skill).

steps.name: vlm-forensics
steps.prompt_template: Apply full image forensics pipeline to asset {{asset_data.asset_hash}}. Run: (1) caption_consistency check against claim: {{input.claim_text}}, (2) manipulation_check for deepfake/splice indicators, (3) EXIF validation if metadata available. For video: analyse each keyframe in {{asset_data.keyframe_paths}} individually then aggregate. Use image-forensics skill prompts. Return full VisualEvidence JSON.

steps.name: reverse-image-search
steps.prompt_template: Perform reverse image lineage search for asset hash {{asset_data.asset_hash}}, URL: {{input.asset_url}}. Use multi-search-engine and browser-use to find earlier publications of this image/video. Identify original context, original date, and any prior fact-checks. Return: earliest_known_url, original_context, original_date, prior_factchecks.

steps.name: caption-cross-check
steps.prompt_template: Cross-check visual findings against textual claim. VLM forensics result: {{vlm_forensics_result}}. Reverse image search: {{reverse_image_result}}. Original claim: {{input.claim_text}}. Does the visual evidence support, refute, or complicate the textual claim? Output updated verdict JSON incorporating visual evidence.

steps.name: overlay-generation
steps.prompt_template: Generate factcheck overlay badge for asset {{asset_data.asset_hash}} using nano-banana-pro skill. Integrated verdict: {{integrated_verdict}}. Apply appropriate badge text from image-forensics skill config. Save to output/visual/forensics/{{asset_data.asset_hash}}_overlay.png.

steps.name: provenance-attach-visual
steps.prompt_template: Attach VisualEvidence node to provenance graph. Claim ID: {{input.claim_id}}. VLM forensics: {{vlm_forensics_result}}. Reverse image: {{reverse_image_result}}. Overlay path: {{overlay_result.overlay_path}}. Asset data: {{asset_data}}.
